---
title: "action"
---

Routines to deal with action values, tailored for the Nested Sampling data

::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal"}
**Source:** [`nested_sampling/action.py`](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/nested_sampling/action.py)
:::


## API Reference

#### `get_n_plaq` {#get_n_plaq}

```python
def get_n_plaq(T: int, L: int, ndims: int)
```

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/nested_sampling/action.py#L5){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---

### `PureGauge` {#puregauge}

```python
class PureGauge
```

Routines for the pure gauge theory

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/nested_sampling/action.py#L12){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---

#### `PureGauge.plaquette_to_action` {#puregauge-plaquette_to_action}

```python
def plaquette_to_action(beta: float, P: np.ndarray, T: int, L: int, ndims: int)
```

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/nested_sampling/action.py#L15){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---

#### `PureGauge.action_to_plaquette` {#puregauge-action_to_plaquette}

```python
def action_to_plaquette(beta: float, S: np.ndarray, T: int, L: int, ndims: int)
```

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/nested_sampling/action.py#L21){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---
